vocabulary.description: Set of account UIDs to filter items. Only items from these accounts will be returned.
List of actions made by users
The user who performed the action
Labels added to the item during this event
Number of times videos of the channel were added to a playlist
S3 URL to access the uploaded file
Average viewing time relative to total video duration
Optional Content Studio session ID for grouping uploads
Ratio of engagement to impression as a percentage
Ratio of engagement to reach as a percentage
Ratio of engagement to view as a percentage
Time people spent watching videos from your channel in minutes
List of user IDs to exclude from mentions (Twitter-specific)
Unique identifier for the group of posts if applicable
Post id on the native network
The ID of the inbox item to reply to
Set of labels/tags to categorize the draft
Maximum number of messages to return per page. Must be between 1 and 25.
Link URL to be included in the post
List of media URLs (images, videos) to be included
The content of the reply message
Number of items with negative sentiment
Number of items with neutral sentiment
List of calendar notes matching the search criteria
Sort order for the results. ASC for ascending (oldest first), DESC for descending (newest first).
Number of organic clicks on posts
Ratio of organic engagement to organic impression as a percentage
Ratio of organic engagement to reach as a percentage
Ratio of organic engagement to view as a percentage
Net organic follower growth (gained minus lost)
The number of times your videos played for at least 30 seconds, or for nearly their total length if they're shorter than 30 seconds
The number of people who viewed your videos from the beginning to 97%, or more, of its length
The number of times your videos played from the beginning to 97%, or more, of its length
Number of paid clicks on posts
Ratio of paid engagement to paid impression as a percentage
Ratio of paid engagement to reach as a percentage
Ratio of paid engagement to view as a percentage
Net paid follower growth (gained minus lost)
The number of times your promoted videos played for at least 30 seconds, or for nearly their total length if they're shorter than 30 seconds
The number of people who viewed your promoted videos from the beginning to 97%, or more, of its length
The number of times your promoted videos played from the beginning to 97%, or more, of its length
The payload containing the group of posts information
Number of clicks to view photos
Number of items with positive sentiment
Post url on the native network
List of posts in the group

When true, sends a private message to the user instead of replying publicly to a public item (e.g., comment). The reply will be sent as a direct/private message. Supported by Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.
List of profile UIDs associated with the note
CDN URL to access the uploaded file
List of publishing dates in ISO-8601 format
Query parameters used for the search
Number of times videos of the channel were removed from a playlist
Headers the client MUST include in the PUT upload request
Ratio of positive items divided by the total of positive and negative items
Number of subscribers gained from the video
Filter items that need review (not yet approved by a manager)
Filter items by type/source. Specify the types of items to retrieve (e.g., organicComment, adsComment, conversation, ...)
Presigned PUT URL - upload file with HTTP PUT to this URL
Name of the user who performed community management actions
The number of people who viewed your videos for at least 30 seconds, or for nearly their total length if they're shorter than 30 seconds
The number of times your videos automatically played at each interval as a percentage of all automatic views
The number of times your videos played at each interval as a percentage of all views, after people clicked play
The time watched in milliseconds for video play-pause cycles that are at least 3 seconds
Number of times the video is watched fully
Video viewing time (sec) by age and gender
Number of viewers who made engaged plays on the video
Number of video views generated by autoplayed videos
Number of video views generated by click-to-play
Ratio of average viewing time to total video duration as a percentage
